recent_projects.name: openTSNEslim
recent_projects.summary: openTSNEslim is a slimmed down version of openTSNE that doesn't require use of scikit-learn or scipy for inference. This is useful for creating a smaller bundle for deployment.
recent_projects.author: Sam Pink
